summary: New team territory mapping plus directory and export improvements.

updates.title: Team Map & Territory Assignment
updates.body: When creating an FRM or Field Sales team, admins can now assign a geographic Map and Territory to scope the team.

updates.title: HCO Contact Details on Profile
updates.body: HCO profiles now display phone, fax, and email directly on the page.

updates.title: Smarter Directory Search
updates.body: Search in HCO, Contact, and address filters now returns matches across all records, not just the first page.

updates.title: Task Export
updates.body: CRM Tasks export to CSV/Excel now includes the Description column.

updates.title: HCP Directory Stability
updates.body: The HCP directory no longer errors when an affiliated account has been removed.
